details.test: Task 1: Reserve cheapest Saturday guided house tour next month
Task 2: Wedding reception venue inquiry under 5000
Task 3: Buy tickets for cheapest family-friendly evening event this month
Task 4: Purchase three gift shop items under 75
Task 5: Sign up for annual membership under 150 with free admission
Task 6: Plan accessibility-friendly weekday morning self-guided visit
Task 7: Request weekday morning school field trip for 25 students
Task 8: Choose corporate retreat space with AV support
Task 9: Reserve earliest Spanish-language guided tour after 1 PM
Task 10: Make one-time 75 donation to Preservation Fund with email opt-in
